title: MemoDigest
description: Condensed summary from Memo Agent for Roadmap Manager consumption

key_observations.description: Key observations from recent turns (e.g., 'Student successfully loaded CSV', 'Student confused about DataFrame indexing')

student_struggles.description: Areas where student is struggling (e.g., 'File path handling', 'Understanding boolean indexing')

student_strengths.description: Areas where student is doing well (e.g., 'Good understanding of basic syntax', 'Asks clarifying questions')

student_sentiment.description: Overall emotional state detected across recent turns

progress_delta.description: Progress change since last memo update

diagnostic_log.description: Internal diagnostic notes (not shown to student, not fed to CA by default)

achievement_log.description: Per-task cumulative record of student's substantive outputs

accumulated_output.description: Cumulative record of student's substantive outputs for this task

last_updated_turn.description: Turn index when this achievement was last updated

skipped_tasks.description: List of task IDs that were skipped in this session
